1. This is a brand new near completion double storey semi detached house located at Lorong Stampin Tengah 5 behind Green Heights in Kuching. This is a high end well sought after residential area in Kuching. The occupation permit (OP) is expected to be ready by 31 March 2026.
2. Land size: 365.1 sq metres/ 3,929 sq feet/ 9.0 points.
3. Leasehold: 25 May 2012 to 24 May 2111.
4. Remaining leasehold: 85 years.
5. Built up area is 2,036 sq feet.
6. There are 4 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms and the shaded car porch is able to accommodate 3 cars. The three bedrooms at the first floor are en-suite.
7. Direction of main door/gate: North.
8. Selling price: RM 2,180,000

Interested for viewing, please get in touch with
David Ling REN 38839, HP: 019-8590515
Sinjun Properties
E(3)2077
